summary: Frontend testing completed for Student AI Test Results UI - Phase 3 features fully functional. All 5 test scenarios passed: student login, AI test card display, results page with grades/scores/feedback, expandable question details with rubric breakdown, and test-taking UI.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - 'Math Chapter 1 - AI Evaluated' with score 9/11
context_for_next_testing_agent: Student S001 successfully tested against Mathematics subject (ID: f5c2dacf-2649-439c-a845-e7b3876ad4c2). 3 AI tests exist: 'Mathematics Chapter 1 - AI Test' (not submitted), 'E2E Test - All Question Types' (not submitted), 'Math Chapter 1 - AI Evaluated' (submitted with score 9/11, 81.82%). The StudentAITest component properly handles both test-taking and results display modes. All data-testid attributes work correctly.

test_1_student_views_ai_tests.description: Login as S001, navigate to Mathematics, verify AI-EVALUATED TESTS header and test cards with AI badge, title, question count, marks, duration, deadline
findings: Login works correctly (S001/123456)
Subject cards visible after 12-15s login wait
Mathematics subject loads data in ~8s via Promise.allSettled
AI-EVALUATED TESTS header visible
3 AI test cards displayed with gradient purple borders and AI badge
Test cards show: title, question count, marks, duration, deadline
Submitted test shows score and 'View Results' button
Unsubmitted tests show 'Attempt Test' button

test_2_view_results.description: Click 'View Results' on submitted test, verify results page shows grade, score, percentage, improvement notes, per-question breakdown
findings: Results page loads correctly
Grade letter 'A' displayed in green
Score '9/11' displayed
Percentage '81.82%' displayed
Improvement Notes section visible with personalized feedback
Question-wise Breakdown section with 5 question cards
Each card shows: Q number, type (MCQ/TF/Short Answer/etc), status (Correct/Partial/Incorrect), marks

test_3_expand_question_details.description: Click Q4 row to expand, verify student answer, feedback, rubric breakdown shown
findings: Q4 (Short Answer, Partial, 2/3) expands on click
Shows Question: 'Define prime number with an example.'
Shows Your Answer: 'A prime number has exactly two factors which are 1 and the number itself.'
Shows Feedback: 'The student provided a correct definition of a prime number but did not include an example.'
Shows Rubric Breakdown with checkmarks/crosses: Definition (2/marks, covered), Example (0/marks, missed)

test_4_attempt_test_ui.description: Click 'Attempt Test', verify test-taking UI with timer, question navigation, MCQ options
findings: Loading spinner shows 'Loading test...'
Test-taking UI loads after start API call
Timer shows '29:59' (green, 30 min duration)
Progress bar shows '0/5 answered'
Question navigation dots 1-5 visible (1 highlighted)
Question card shows type badge (Multiple Choice) and marks (2 marks)
Question text 'Q1. What is 5 + 7?' displayed
MCQ options A-D visible and clickable
Previous/Next navigation buttons present

test_5_back_button.description: Test Back button from results and test-taking views
findings: Back button from results page returns to Mathematics subject page
AI test cards still visible after navigation back
Back button uses data-testid='sat-results-back' and 'sat-back-btn'
